title: Generating a B-Tree Node
scenario: Write a function that generates a node for a B-Tree data structure. The input will be a key and a value, as well as the degree of the tree. The function should return a node with the given key and value, and the correct number of children. The node should be implemented using a dictionary to store the key-value pairs.
constraints: Must include a check to ensure the key is unique
Must return a dictionary representing the node

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct B-Tree logic to create a node.
The returned node has the correct degree and contains the given key-value pair.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of operations.
